title: Demand and supply
summary: 9609 AS marketing — market demand, supply, and equilibrium in business context.
learningObjectives: Explain factors shifting demand for a product.

simpleExplanation.title: Markets balance buyers and sellers
simpleExplanation.summary: Demand reflects willingness to buy at each price. Supply reflects willingness to sell. Equilibrium clears the market.
steps: Surplus pushes price down; shortage pushes up.
Marketing can shift demand curve right.

sections.content: **Demand and supply** (3.1.2) uses **9708-style diagrams** in a **marketing** context. Link shifts to **promotion and pricing**.

sections.label: Mark a demand and supply question
